meta.title: Devya Feedback
meta.description: Share your honest take on working with Devya Solutions. Independent, verified feedback that shapes how we hire and how future teams find us.

home.headline: You’ll normally reach this page via a personal link from Ahmed.
home.bodyBefore: If you’re a Devya team member, head to the admin dashboard. Otherwise reach out at

client.linkExpired: This feedback link has expired or been closed.
client.contactUs: Reach out at contact@devya.dev if you believe this is a mistake.
client.ratingSubline: Your honest take shapes how we work with the next client — and helps future teams decide whether to hire us.
client.consentLabel: I agree Devya Solutions may publish my note and photo — with my first name and company — on its website and review profiles.
client.consentHint: Tick the box to include your note or photo, or clear them to submit just the rating.
client.privacyNote: Your rating helps us improve. A note or photo is only published with your consent, and you can withdraw it anytime by emailing contact@devya.dev.
client.thanksHigh: That means a lot — thank you.
client.pickPlatform: Pick a platform to leave your public review
client.pickPlatformSubline: Choose whichever you already have an account on. All are third-party verified — we don’t see or edit anything you write.
client.thanksLow: Thank you for the honest feedback.
client.privateFormSubline: Your reply goes straight to Ahmed’s inbox — it’s not published anywhere and you’ll hear back within 24 hours.
client.privatePlaceholder: What could we have done better?
client.privateSubmitted: Got it — you should hear from Ahmed within a day.

admin.title: Admin
admin.emptyState: No feedback requests yet. Create one above.
